doc.field: Collection processed by Finding aid prepared by Alta Macadam

HA at the British Institute (Consultation Room), Palazzo Lanfredini, Firenze [and the Board of Governors, 1975] with Freya Starke, Lord Forte, Jack Walters, Ian Greenlees (Director), Lord (Oliver) Poole,[..],[..], Carel Johnson, Rolando Anzilotti,[..], Giuliano Pellegrini, Lord (Edward) Hastings,[..], Sidney Hepplethwaite (GB Consul),[..], Sergio Baldi, Denis Walters, MP

Series I: The Actons >> Subseries C: Acton, Harold (HA) >> 14 HA at formal ceremonies >> HA at the British Institute (Consultation Room), Palazzo Lanfredini, Firenze [and the Board of Governors, 1975] with Freya Starke, Lord Forte, Jack Walters, Ian Greenlees (Director), Lord (Oliver) Poole,[..],[..], Carel Johnson, Rolando Anzilotti,[..], Giuliano Pellegrini, Lord (Edward) Hastings,[..], Sidney Hepplethwaite (GB Consul),[..], Sergio Baldi, Denis Walters, MP
